asset_guidance.production_asset_note: Any illustrations, icons, or marketing artwork should be specified as production assets separately before implementation.
asset_guidance.source_of_truth: Use the canonical contract plus inspiration notes as the design source of truth. Scraped images are references, not production UI assets.

component_guidance.button.primary: Implement as the single dominant CTA pattern. Keep tap target at least 44 logical pixels tall and avoid visual competition nearby.
component_guidance.card.default: Use as the default grouped content container. Keep padding and corner treatment aligned with the canonical tokens.

principles: Centralize typography and colors in a shared theme layer.
Preserve one dominant CTA per screen unless the contract expands it.
design_intent.summary: Implement the validated mobile contract on Flutter without reinterpreting hierarchy, spacing rhythm, or accessibility rules.

implementation_notes: Prefer shared theme primitives over per-screen styling decisions.
Use the screen specs to drive layout, not the inspiration screenshots directly.

interaction_guidance.disabled.opacity: Disabled actions should remain legible and clearly unavailable, not simply faded into invisibility.
interaction_guidance.pressed.scale: Pressed feedback should be subtle and fast. Avoid exaggerated motion that fights the calm tone.

layout_guidance.scroll.vertical: Assume portrait-first vertical scrolling. Keep the primary action reachable without overlong initial layouts.

typography_guidance.app.body: Use the default long-form or explanatory text style. Preserve readable line-height and contrast.
typography_guidance.app.display: Use the hero headline style for onboarding or first-run emphasis. Preserve the contract font family, weight, and line-height in the Flutter theme.
typography_guidance.app.title: Use the primary section or page title style. Keep dynamic type enabled and avoid local overrides.

visual_guidance.action.primary: Use the primary accent color for the main CTA pattern. Keep contrast against text.onAction at AA or better.
visual_guidance.surface.canvas: Treat this as the screen background surface. Avoid adding extra noise or gradients unless the contract explicitly asks for it.
visual_guidance.surface.card: Use for elevated content clusters or modules that need separation from the canvas.
visual_guidance.text.onAction: Reserve for text placed on the primary action surface. It must remain legible in all states.
